title: Slay the Spire 2 is out NOW in Early Access!!
author: demileaf
contents:
The Spire has finally reawakened.

[i][b]Slay the Spire 2[/b][/i], the long awaited sequel to the original genre-defining roguelike deckbuilder, is [b]available now on Steam Early Access[/b]!

https://store.steampowered.com/app/2868840/Slay_the_Spire_2/
We're so excited for you all to see for yourselves what we've been working on for the past 5 years. If you've been keeping up with our monthly Neowsletters, you already know that this reawakened Spire has a LOT of new features and content compared to the one you may already know, but there's plenty more to discover and much more on the way. For more info, you can check out our [url=https://steamcommunity.com/app/2868840/discussions/0/4355620416676744549/]FAQ[/url].

For those who have never ventured into the Spire before, you don't need any prior experience with [i]Slay the Spire 1[/i] to enjoy what [i]Slay the Spire 2[/i] has to offer. Now is a great time to dive right in and ascend the Spire, either on your own or—this time around—with your friends!

[h3]About Slay the Spire 2[/h3]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44971832/310c731af8708aec9a7adf5a7d2e2e5961b6adee.png[/img]
For 1,000 years, the Spire lay dormant, its secrets buried and its horrors forgotten. Now, it has reopened, hungrier and more dangerous than ever, devouring all who dare to ascend.

New perils demand sharper strategies, relentless cunning, and unwavering resolve. Outwit the Spire’s brutal trials and uncover the truths hidden at its peak.

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44971832/8fa66832ff793af6a347b63972bd00196d324f34.png[/img]
Climb the Spire with a [b]new and returning cast of characters[/b], each with their own cards, motives, and secrets. Make allies of the most ancient of the Spire’s residents, encounter all-new environments, defeat formidable foes, and uncover fragments of the Spire’s past as you ascend it again and again.

Also, while you can always choose to brave the ascent on your own, up to 4 players can now team up to face the Spire’s challenges together in an all-new [b]co-op mode[/b]. Discover multiplayer-specific cards, powerful team synergies, and carry your friends (or get carried) to victory!

[h3]About Early Access[/h3]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44971832/41f231b07c56c1dbdda7828b532b542bd40c886e.png[/img]
The Spire truly is ever-changing… in more ways than one. While [i]Slay the Spire 2[/i] already has more content than [i]Slay the Spire 1[/i], even more content—including cards, events, environments, enemies, and more—will be added and balanced throughout Early Access.

We don't have a specific timeline to share with you all, but we'll be sure to keep you regularly updated and give you peeks behind the development curtain. Your feedback (as well as your fanart and memes) will be invaluable throughout this process, just as it was with the first game. This time, you'll be able to submit your feedback and bug reports in-game! Join the journey now to [b]be a part of the Spire’s next evolution[/b].
